title: mesosphaerum lappulaceum
intro: Mesosphaerum lappulaceum, also known as Lappuline or Wild Hyssop, is a flowering plant in the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum lappulaceum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Mesosphaerum lappulaceum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
